title: Methodology breaks table
description: Hand-authored typed catalogue of methodology breaks per D16/D28. Distinct from caveats.json (D16): methodology breaks are RUPTURES IN A SINGLE SERIES (base-year rebases, definition changes, frame/coverage changes — e.g. GSDP NAS 2004-05 -> 2011-12, CPI rebase, Census rebase). Surfaced as visible vertical rule on the time axis (D32) — never tooltip-only. The renderer MUST refuse to compute growth rates that cross a break (Bhattacharya rule, R31). Composes with D28 id-encoded breaks: the URL/id carries the visible split (`state-gsdp-base-2011-12-inr-crore` separate from `state-gsdp-base-2004-05-inr-crore`); this table carries the narrative prose. Authoring shape JSON (D18); pipeline compiles to taxonomy/methodology_breaks.parquet.

x-changelog.description: Initial canonical methodology-breaks table schema (Phase 0.3 of TODO/20260517-canonical-long-format-pivot.md). Each row has methodology_version (FK target from indicators.json), the (year, period_seq) coordinate of the break, kind enum, and citizen-readable note. Series the break applies to is the set of indicator_ids that point at this methodology_version (resolved at chart time, not stored here — keeps the table normalised).

methodology_version.description: PK. Stable handle (e.g. 'gsdp-base-2011-12', 'cpi-base-2012', 'census-2011-frame'). Indicators in indicators.json reference this via methodology_version FK.

at_year.description: Year of the break — the FIRST year the new methodology applies. The vertical rule is drawn between (at_year - 1, period_seq=N) and (at_year, at_period_seq) on the time axis.

at_period_seq.description: Intra-year sequence the break takes effect. For annual breaks: 1. For quarterly/monthly: the period_seq of the first new-methodology observation.

kind.description: Type of rupture. rebase = price/base-year shift. definition_change = the thing measured changed. frame_change = sampling frame moved. coverage_change = geographic / population scope shifted. reclassification = enum/category labels regrouped.

note.description: Citizen-readable explanation surfaced when the user taps the break marker. Plain language: 'Base year shifted from 2004-05 to 2011-12; values before and after are not directly comparable.'

publisher_url.description: Optional pointer to the authoritative publisher methodology note announcing the break.

supersedes_methodology_version.description: Optional pointer to the previous methodology_version. Lets the renderer trace the chain (NAS-2011-12 supersedes NAS-2004-05 supersedes NAS-1999-2000).
